top_signals.title: Fed Seen With Case to ‘Hike Right Now’ as Bar to Act Gets Lower
top_signals.summary: The bar for a Federal Reserve rate hike is falling as the job market remains robust in the face of stubborn price pressures, according to Collin Martin at the Schwab Center for Financial Research.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: SpaceX Set for Historic IPO This Week
top_signals.summary: Elon Musk wants to build the infrastructure for AI in space — and he's asking investors to help pay for it. The rocket, satellite and now AI company wants to raise around 75 billion dollars in what could become the largest IPO in history, funding everything from its Starship rocket to AI computing power and future data centers in orbit. Bloomberg Tech's Ed Ludlow takes a look at what's at stake. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Policy paper: AI Economics Institute Prospectus
top_signals.summary: The prospectus sets out how the AI Economics Institute will deliver its research through two core functions: building and analysing the evidence base to understand AI’s economic effects, and developing models and scenarios to inform resilient, future facing policy making.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Policy paper: Introducing the AI Economics Institute
top_signals.summary: Overview of AI Economics Institute, its role in analysing AI’s economic impacts and how it will support evidence-based policy making in the UK.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Elon Musk’s SpaceX courts retail investors
top_signals.summary: Plus, redemption woes at Partners Group, shorting call centre stocks and Le Parc at Tate Modern
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Russia seeks to label two anti-Kremlin hacker groups as ‘extremist’
top_signals.summary: The groups have previously claimed responsibility for cyberattacks targeting critical infrastructure and government institutions in Russia and Belarus.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: NEAR gains 12.3% as almost all assets trade higher
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: SoftBank drops 6% as tech stock sell-off accelerates in Asia
top_signals.summary: The tech stock sell-off accelerates in Asia. Tech stocks fell in Europe but rebounded later on Monday.
